title: Long-range turbolaser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Long-range turbolaser''' technology was developed by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
Long-range turbolasers had a significantly longer effective range and were far more powerful than typical ones, allowing ships equipped with them to engage enemy craft from a distance at which the enemy could not respond, though at the expense of even greater power drain; even when mounted on an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], the drain was quite noticeable.

==History==
Prototype long-range turbolasers were installed on a few [[Hapan Battle Dragon]]s and on the nose of the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']], which used them to bombard [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] until they were sabotaged and destroyed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Long-range turbolaser technology was stolen by the [[Confederation]] very early on, however, and the Confederation was able to deploy the technology on many of its [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] at the [[Second Battle of Balmorra]] without the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]] being so equipped. Only [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]] [[Gavin Darklighter]]'s bold tactic of sending his starfighter screen to engage the capital ships while leaving his own fleet open to starfighter counterattack was able to prevent the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] from being forced to withdraw. [[Super-class Star Destroyer|''Super''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Megador]]'' was also equipped by long-range turbolasers, using them during [[Battle of Uroro Station]] in [[41 ABY]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
